mapper.sql: id, userId, openid, templateId, subscribed, remainCount, createdAt, updatedAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM subscriptions WHERE userId = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subscriptions (userId, openid, templateId, subscribed, remainCount) VALUES (#{userId}, #{openid}, #{templateId}, #{subscribed}, #{remainCount})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM subscriptions WHERE subscribed = true AND remainCount > 0
